description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a combination of smooth concrete or stucco walls, large glass windows, and accent stonework, especially near the entryway. The front includes a covered porch area supported by a single column, and a driveway leading to a garage with a wide door. Decorative elements such as vertical slats and a patterned privacy screen add visual interest to the facade. The rear and side elevations show a mix of open and enclosed spaces, including a partially covered patio and a small garden area. The overall color palette is neutral, dominated by shades of white, gray, and some black accents.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist facade featuring stone and decorative screens. The design includes a covered entry, garage, and neutral color palette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, garage door, and decorative stonework.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid garage wall, windowless sections, and partial view of the rear patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, privacy screens, and a partially covered patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical slats, additional decorative screens, and a glimpse of the entryway structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and decorative screens
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entry with a single column, flat overhang, and accent stonework near a modern door
